main.title: Tura terminal client
usage: tura [OPTIONS] exec [PROMPT...]        run the Rust CLI front
tura [OPTIONS] run [PROMPT...]         run a non-interactive prompt

commands.name: run
commands.summary: send a prompt through the gateway and stream the answer

commands.name: exec
commands.summary: forward to the Rust CLI front (`tura_exec`)

commands.name: bash
commands.summary: run a prompt with command tools forced to bash

commands.name: zsh
commands.summary: run a prompt with command tools forced to zsh

commands.name: shel
commands.summary: run a prompt with command tools forced to shell_command

commands.name: resume
commands.summary: show an existing session or append a follow-up prompt

commands.name: config
commands.summary: read or update workspace session config

commands.name: provider
commands.summary: list providers and inspect auth state

commands.name: agent
commands.summary: list, read, create, update, or set agent models

commands.name: persona
commands.summary: list, read, create, update, or delete personas

commands.name: file
commands.summary: list, read, open, or reveal workspace files

commands.name: inspect
commands.summary: show gateway service, paths, and sessions

commands.name: gateway
commands.summary: send a raw gateway CLI protocol request

commands.name: completion
commands.summary: generate shell completion for bash, zsh, or fish

options.summary: open the interactive TUI on a specific session

sections.title: Examples
lines: tura run "Inspect the workspace and summarize the architecture"
tura exec "Inspect the workspace using the Rust CLI front"
tura zsh "Inspect shell startup files with zsh semantics"
tura run --shel "Use the system shell_command surface"
tura run --model openai/gpt-5 --output ndjson "Fix the failing test"

options.summary: append the prompt to an existing session
enable priority model routing for this model
force the command-run shell surface for this prompt
stream gateway events or poll for completion
runtime override, for example model=gpt-5 or command_run_shell=zsh
select the most recently updated session
output mode when sending a follow-up prompt

sections.title: Notes
lines: Session config uses /session/config; default model tier config uses the shared GUI /model_config provider_config.json.

provider.title: Providers
usage: tura [OPTIONS] provider set-auth PROVIDER --key KEY [--type api]

agent.title: Agents
usage: tura [OPTIONS] agent create AGENT_ID [--config JSON_OR_PATH] [--prompt TEXT|--prompt-file PATH]
tura [OPTIONS] agent update AGENT_ID [--config JSON_OR_PATH] [--prompt TEXT|--prompt-file PATH]

persona.title: Personas
usage: tura [OPTIONS] persona create PERSONA_ID [--config JSON_OR_PATH] [--persona TEXT|--persona-file PATH]
tura [OPTIONS] persona update PERSONA_ID [--config JSON_OR_PATH] [--communication-style TEXT|--communication-style-file PATH]

options.summary: JSON object sent as CLI protocol params
JSON payload sent through the CLI protocol
